SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.expander

Class TurboExpanderSealGasEnvelope

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.expander.TurboExpanderSealGasEnvelope
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TurboExpanderSealGasEnvelope extends Object implements Serializable
TurboExpanderSealGasEnvelope (P5) converts a thermodynamically feasible turbo-expander-compressor operating point into a mechanically allowable one by checking the rotating-equipment envelope that the thermodynamic model does not see:
  • Net axial thrust as a function of expander and compressor differential pressure, and the resulting thrust-bearing utilisation against its rated capacity.
  • Dry-gas-seal seal-gas flow and the seal-gas heater duty required to keep the seal-gas supply above its dew-point margin, checked against the installed heater rating (Oseberg FE-25832 = 28 kW with a 30 °C thermostat set point).
  • First lateral critical-speed separation margin per API 617 (15% minimum).

All quantities use simple, transparent engineering correlations with configurable areas and limits so the envelope can be anchored to certified OEM data. The class is independent of the heavier TurboExpanderCompressorMechanicalDesign so it can be used as a fast feasibility gate inside operating-envelope sweeps.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private double
    balancePistonOffload
    Balance-piston offload fraction (0..1); fraction of gross thrust removed by the balance drum.
    private double
    compressorThrustArea
    Effective compressor thrust-balance area in m^2.
    private double
    criticalSpeedMargin
    Critical-speed separation margin (fraction) at the operating speed.
    private double
    expanderThrustArea
    Effective expander thrust-balance area in m^2.

    requiredHeaterDuty
    Required seal-gas heater duty in W.

    sealGasFlowPerSeal
    Seal-gas mass flow per seal in kg/s (two dry-gas seals).
    private double
    sealGasHeaterRating
    Installed seal-gas heater rating in W (FE-25832 = 28 kW).
    private double
    sealGasSetPointC
    Seal-gas heater thermostat set point in deg C.
    private double
    sealGasSpecificHeat
    Seal-gas specific heat in J/(kg K).

    Seal-gas supply temperature in deg C.

    Serialization version UID.
    private double
    thrustBearingCapacity
    Rated thrust-bearing capacity in N (tilting-pad double-acting).
    private double
    thrustUtilisation
    Thrust-bearing utilisation fraction (load/capacity).

    Compute the net axial thrust from the expander and compressor differential pressures and the configured thrust-balance areas and balance-piston offload.

    Compute the first-critical-speed separation margin at the operating speed.

    Compute the seal-gas heater duty required to raise the seal-gas supply from its supply temperature to the thermostat set point for both dry-gas seals.

  • Constructor Details

    • TurboExpanderSealGasEnvelope

      public TurboExpanderSealGasEnvelope()
      Default constructor.

    • TurboExpanderSealGasEnvelope

      public TurboExpanderSealGasEnvelope(TurboExpanderCompressor machine)
      Constructs an envelope evaluator for the given machine.
      Parameters:
      machine - the turbo-expander-compressor to evaluate

  • Method Details

    • evaluate

      public boolean evaluate()
      Evaluate the full mechanical envelope at the machine's current operating point. The machine must already have been run so the streams and speed reflect the operating point.
      Returns:
      true if the operating point is mechanically allowable (thrust within bearing capacity, heater duty within rating and critical-speed margin satisfied)

    • calcAxialThrust

      public double calcAxialThrust()
      Compute the net axial thrust from the expander and compressor differential pressures and the configured thrust-balance areas and balance-piston offload.
      Returns:
      the net axial thrust in N

    • calcSealGasHeaterDuty

      public double calcSealGasHeaterDuty()
      Compute the seal-gas heater duty required to raise the seal-gas supply from its supply temperature to the thermostat set point for both dry-gas seals.
      Returns:
      the required seal-gas heater duty in W

    • calcCriticalSpeedMargin

      public double calcCriticalSpeedMargin()
      Compute the first-critical-speed separation margin at the operating speed.
      Returns:
      the separation margin (fraction); positive means the operating speed is sufficiently above the first critical speed

    • isThrustAcceptable

      public boolean isThrustAcceptable()
      Returns whether the net axial thrust is within the thrust-bearing capacity.
      Returns:
      true if the thrust utilisation is at or below 1.0

    • isHeaterDutyAcceptable

      public boolean isHeaterDutyAcceptable()
      Returns whether the required seal-gas heater duty is within the installed heater rating.
      Returns:
      true if the required duty is at or below the heater rating

    • isCriticalSpeedMarginAcceptable

      public boolean isCriticalSpeedMarginAcceptable()
      Returns whether the first-critical-speed separation margin satisfies the API 617 minimum.
      Returns:
      true if the separation margin is at or above the configured minimum

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Build a map of the mechanical envelope results.
      Returns:
      an ordered map of named result values

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serialise the mechanical envelope results to JSON.
      Returns:
      a pretty-printed JSON string of the envelope results

    • getNetAxialThrust

      public double getNetAxialThrust()
      Get the net axial thrust.
      Returns:
      the net axial thrust in N

    • getThrustUtilisation

      public double getThrustUtilisation()
      Get the thrust-bearing utilisation.
      Returns:
      the thrust utilisation (load/capacity)

    • getRequiredHeaterDuty

      public double getRequiredHeaterDuty()
      Get the required seal-gas heater duty.
      Returns:
      the required heater duty in W

    • getCriticalSpeedMargin

      public double getCriticalSpeedMargin()
      Get the critical-speed separation margin.
      Returns:
      the critical-speed margin (fraction)

      public void setMachine(TurboExpanderCompressor machine)
      Set the machine to evaluate.
      Parameters:
      machine - the turbo-expander-compressor

      Set the effective expander and compressor thrust-balance areas.

      compressorArea - the effective compressor thrust area in m^2
